feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR & PA0000(CDS View) BW4HANA
entry.content:
hello All! 

Could anyone assist me? I’m creating a CompositeProvider in Eclipse for BW/4HANA modeling. I need to filter records for Transfer Postings, so I applied the MASSN code Z7 in PA0000 to extract all transfer-posting cases. To retrieve the latest updated information, I’m joining these PERNRs with PA0001, applying the filter ENDDA = 31.12.9999, so I can get the corresponding PERSK and PERSG values for the most current records.

Since the PA0001 data is available through the standard InfoObject 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR, I use that to retrieve PERSG and PERSK. However, for PA0000, I created a custom DataSource with code to extract the required MASSN-based records.

 

define view ZCDS_PA0000_Z7 as select from pa0000

 

 

{

key concat( pernr, begda )as ZCONC_KEY_UNIQUE,

 

key pernr,

key begda,

// key endda,

massn

}

 

where

 

//massn = 'Z4'

//or

massn = 'Z7'

 

Here is the rephrased version in a clear and professional way:

I mapped the start date (BEGDA) field to the standard InfoObject 0VALIDFROM.
When I run the InfoObject independently, it works fine and returns accurate results.
However, when I combine it with 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR, the output becomes incorrect for the condition ENDDA = 31.12.9999.

Whether I use a left outer join or an inner join, the issue remains the same:

  • PA0000 gives 199 records (MASSN = Z7)

  • PA0001 / 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR gives 153 updated records

  • But in the CompositeProvider, it still shows 199 records instead of 153, even though 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR should return only the updated records.

I am not sure why this mismatch is happening, since 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR is supposed to provide only the latest active record with ENDDA = 31.12.9999.

entry.title: SAP BW Query Constant Selection
entry.content:
Hi experts,

60 is the summation of AMT , and what I want is the every row of field  "AMT_ALL"  equals to 60 too.

How to achieve this using  Constant Selection ?

Tks.

entry.title: Dynamic table name in Select * From (Table_name)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've created on Global Class in SE24, in which I've created the methods as per my requirements, for now I've made it statically that when I call the method it will fetch the corresponding data given in Select statment.

But I want to make it dynamic that while calling that method I can pass the table name as parameter and it will fetch the records for that corresponding table. So, is it possible to do it this way or there is any other way around that im missing?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to prevent BW/4HANA process chains from running when EDP pipeline fails?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an external data processing (EDP) pipeline that feeds data into BW/4HANA. Currently, BW process chains run on a schedule, but we need to ensure that if the EDP pipeline fails, BW loads do not start.

What is the best approach to implement this dependency?

  • Should we use a control table or event-based triggering?
  • How can EDP communicate its success/failure status to BW/4HANA?
  • Any recommended best practices or SAP-supported patterns for this scenario?

Our goal is to avoid partial or incorrect loads in BW when upstream data is incomplete.

Thanks in advance for your guidance!

SAP BW/4HANA #EDP

entry.title: Regarding Modules in SAP BW
entry.content:
Hii Guys,

Recently I was working with HR Module, and now I want to explore other modules too, MM, SD, FI, etc.
can anyone please share some kinda  notes or any other materials regarding this, also im trying to find blogs and post regarding this.

 

Thank You.

entry.title: Standard Table for Listing InfoObjects with Attribute and Text Master Data
entry.content: Is there a standard table that provides a list of all InfoObjects with their attribute and text master data in the system?

entry.title: Error in OData call made with self sign certificate
entry.content:
Hello All,

We want to establish a connection between a Python and SAP through OData call. For this, we are using a self signed X.509 certificate which we generated using OpenSSL. 

when we make a Odata call [which is based on a BW query], we are getting a 404 error with description : Please select a valid URL. If it is a valid URL, check whether service /sap/opu/odata/sap/<service_name>/$metadata is active in transaction SICF. 

we have set the odata Logon detail to SSL Certificate.

could you tell where we could be going wrong and how we can fix it?

OData SAP BW/4HANA Python

entry.title: Function Module Based Generic Extractor
entry.content:
I've one FM Based extractor and  Its running okie but there is one extra package coming, and because of that the first package is not coming in final output.

for example, I'm extracting 10 packages, each package is containing 100 records and function module is extracting 11 packages,

so the initial package 0-100 records are missing and in last package instead of getting 900-1000 recordd im getting 11th package which contains 1000-1100.

and I guess the problem is in closing the coursor, can anyone help me on this one, when done hard code like suppose ive one variable "lv_datapackage"( value is fetched from memory )  which will itrate from 1 to 10 and once its ten it will close the cursor, but as i said its "HARDCODE" I want to make it dynamic. 

 

Thank you

entry.title: How to consume an XXL InfoObejct
entry.content:
Hello,

I was just wondering how to consume an XXL info object, a lengthy text more than 1333 characters. I tried assigning it as XXL attribute in hope of using it, but it didn't even appear as selection in the BW query or AO. If anyone is able to make use of this type of info object in the reporting side, please share. I have gone through a few threads, but just wanted to make sure there is really no way.

Thank you

#SAPBW4HANA

entry.title: SAP BPC Lite Optimize and Housekeeping
entry.content:
Hello,

We recently experienced an issue after our upgrade to BW/4HANA 2021. During data loading into a BPC standard ADSO, the system started showing the warning:“Error requests in ADSO exceed 20000, housekeeping job needed.”

To address this, we created a process chain and transformation package to run Lite Optimize and Housekeeping. However, we had to abort the process. Later, one of our BW consultants manually executed housekeeping successfully.

After that, we attempted to automate the housekeeping process inside a package.
We also implemented the SAP Notes listed under 3012005 – Housekeeping: Collection Note (only the "can be implemented" notes).

When we executed the package including housekeeping, the package finished successfully, but 5 requests in the ADSO moved into ERROR status (red).

At this point: We don’t know how to handle or repair these error requests. We also don’t know the correct procedure to manage ongoing housekeeping in BPC/BW4HANA, especially since the number of requests is increasing and could impact system performance.

If anyone has experience with BPC standard ADSO housekeeping in BW/4HANA specially regarding error requests after housekeepingyour guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: BW/4HANA - how to find fast growing tables
entry.content:
Dear Community

BW/4HANA - how to find fast growing tables

Thanks 

Reinhard

entry.title: Standard date format issue in Smart Business KPI report
entry.content:
Hi All,

we're facing an issue with Date-Display for CDS-Based Queries in Smart Business KPIs. The date values are not displayed according to user settings (for example dd.mm.yyyy). Instead, the KPI report shows dates in internal format yyyymmdd. Standard format is not working dd.mm.yyyy (yyyymmdd) .

  • In the KPI report (Manage KPIs and Reports), all date fields display as yyyymmdd.
  • The expected behavior is that dates should follow the user’s regional/date settings (e.g., dd.mm.yyyy(yyyymmdd)).

  • In the OData service response, the date dimension contains two fields:

    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate
    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate_T

  • We are not explicitly defining any _T fields in our CDS views, but the _T field still appears in OData.

  • The OData service is using standard generic analytics runtime classes:

    • MPC: CL_NAT_GENERIC_MPC
    • DPC: CL_NAT_GENERIC_DPC

  • When I inspect the Fiori KPI app network calls, the GET request uses $select, but it does not include:

    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate_T

    So the KPI report only fetches PlannedGoodsIssueDate and the _T field never reaches the UI.

 

  1. What is the recommended way to ensure date fields are displayed in the user’s date format in KPI tiles?
  2. Is there any known configuration / best practice / SAP note to address this issue?

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance,

PA

entry.title: Consolidation Plan & Actual Data
entry.content:
I want to consolidate Actual and Plan data, but I am facing an issue. The Actual data is coming from /FIGL14, which contains Cost Center, GL Account, and Amount. On the other hand, the planning Model X contains Commitment Item, GL Account, and Fund Center.

The challenge is that /FIGL14 does not contain Commitment Item and Fund Center, so I am unsure how to consolidate the data between these two structures. Could you please advise on how this can be handled?

 

If I use a left outer join, these are the values I am getting. However, the issue is that in the Actuals, the value is appearing against the GL Account instead of the Commitment Item. As a result, the actual data is showing only for the GL account, not for the commitment item.

entry.title: Data upload process on BW aDSO (through DTP manual run) remains pending in yellow status
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
I executed a data upload on a target aDSO through a DTP manual run.
From RSMNG transaction, entering into the target aDSO, it seems the process remains pending in a yellow status forever. I attach a picture of it:

Entering into the "DTP Monitor" is clear that the process is actually terminated:

Same can be viewed from "Job Overview" inside RSMNG, but also by using other transactions like RSDTP or SM37.

I tried to reduce package size of DTP but it is not an issue of data ingestion.
I tried to create a new DTP (the extraction mode is Full) but i bumped into the same issue.
I also tried a forced reactivation of the objects involved (aDSO, Transformations, DTP).

P.S. aDSO target is shared by other process chains which works fine, the only issue is within this process. To me it seems a bug of the process but i'd like to listen other opinions and possible solutions.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Need to enable SAP_BW_HOUSEKEEPING Task List in STC01 tcode in BIQ system
entry.content: Need to enable SAP_BW_HOUSEKEEPING Task List  in STC01 tcode in BIQ system

entry.title: Best Practice für Automatic Implementation of SAP Notes (Transportreigabe)
entry.content:
Beim Update (SUM) wird die Option "Shadow System Development User" im Step "Required Shadow Parameters (PREP_INSTALL/SUBMOD_PREP_INSTALL/INITSHD) per Haken "Yes, SUM shall create a shadow system development user" verwendet.

Bei dem Vorgang wird auch die Funktion "Automated Reset of Obsolete SAP Notes" durchgeführt und auf einen Transport geschrieben. -> https://help.sap.com/docs/SLTOOLSET/b0d775c8a9fd47b985a5e66ddba31d33/46ebfbd34e3c46918ab73cc6919971f2.html#automated-reset-of-obsolete-sap-notes

Laut https://me.sap.com/notes/0003727019 schlägt die SAP vor, den TR nach dem Update freizugeben. Weiterhin wird von einem Transport ins Folgesystem abgeraten, sondern man solle dort erneut die gleiche Option (Yes, SUM shall create a shadow system development user) wie im Vorsystem ausführen .

Beim aktuellen Updateprozess lief der SPAU in eine Sperrsituation, weil Objekte auf dem besagten Transport standen. Da dies nur obsolete Hinweise betrifft, ist dies nicht kritisch.

Aber so stellt sich nun die Frage, wann genau der richtige Zeitpunkt für die Freigabe des Transports ist. Wie oben beschrieben, sollte das nach dem Update passieren. Unserer Meinung nach, wäre der richtige Zeitpunkt, vor SPAU.

Wann ist der tatsächlich richtige Zeitpunkt für die Freigabe des Transports?

entry.title: Displaying issues with Eclipse Modeling Tools
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm facing an issue since the installation of the new Eclipse Modeling Tools Version: 2026-03 (4.39.0) with the latest version of BW Modeling Workbench (please check attached screenshot)

The issue is with Composite providers Scenario tab display and Explore Data Flow option for any BW Object (please check attached screenshots) 

the display is somehow white which blocks me to select related buttons ... 

Could you please help fixing this issue ? Please let me know if further details are needed.

Kind regards,
Mohamed

entry.title: SAP BPC 11.1 on BW/HANA – Gestion des enregistrements à zéro et optimisation/“compression”
entry.content:
Bonjour,

Dans le cadre de l’exploitation de notre environnement SAP BPC 11.1 sur SAP BW on HANA, nous constatons une volumétrie importante sur certaines tables de faits BPC (notamment /1CPMB/*, ex : /1CPMB/G9LLSAD) contenant un nombre significatif d’enregistrements avec des valeurs nulles ou égales à zéro (SIGNEDDATA = 0).

Nous souhaitons optimiser la volumétrie et les performances associées, tout en respectant strictement les bonnes pratiques et le cadre support SAP.

 

Nous souhaitons comprendre :

  • dans quelle mesure l

entry.title: CVSS 9.9 Auth Bypass in SAP BW/BPC — Patch or Mitigate Now (SAP Note 3719353)
entry.content:
Hi All,

Following is the  security disclosure, I’ve summarized the critical vulnerability affecting our SAP landscapes. Unlike standard SQL injections, this is an Authorization Bypass that allows SQL execution through specific upload tools.

Vulnerability Detail: CVE-2026-27681 (SAP Note 3719353)

  • CVSS Score: 9.9 (Critical)
  • Nature of Risk: Authenticated users can bypass authorization checks within specific ABAP upload tools in SAP BPC and BW. This allows for the execution of arbitrary SQL statements, potentially leading to full database compromise (Read/Write/Delete).

Affected Components & Versions:

  • HANABPC: 810
  • BPC4HANA: 300
  • SAP_BW: 750 through 816

Required Action Plan:

  1. Permanent Fix (Priority: High)We need to apply the corrections from SAP Note 3719353 to deactivate the vulnerable code. Please prioritize the following Support Packages for our upcoming maintenance window:
  • SAPK-75035INSAPBW
  • SAPK-81019INHANABPC
  • SAPK-30014INBPC4HANA
  1. Immediate Mitigation (Interim)Until patching is complete, we should immediately restrict the S_GUI authorization object. Specifically, revoking Activity 60 (Upload) from standard end-user roles will block the attack vector by disabling the necessary upload functionality.

Thanks & Regards

HarshaTeja

entry.title: My transport to BW UAT is failing even after trying all the solutions.
entry.content:
I added a field to 0EQUIPMENT and marked it as a Navigational attribute. This 0EQUIPMENT is directly used in composite provider so the flag Usable as Info provider is checked, and I haven't made any changes in the checkboxes. 

Everything was OK in DEV but while importing it in QB1 (UAT), I am getting the error: Characteristic 0EQUIPMENT is disabled as an InfoProvider, but HCPR exists

Message No. R7B351

Diagnosis

Characteristic 0EQUIPMENT is used in other objects (in a SAP HANA CompositeProvider for example). Characteristic 0EQUIPMENT must therefore be flagged as an InfoProvider.

 

Procedure

If you want to disable the InfoProvider setting, delete characteristic 0EQUIPMENT from the objects where it is used.

. I have tried all the solutions, but nothing is working. It is needed the flag to be checked.
